summary: Cost Breakdown section already implemented in report.mjs:67-83, showing $X.XXXX via toFixed(4) when tokenUsage.total.costUsd is present and N/A otherwise. Added 2 targeted tests: one verifying the $0.0050 format when costUsd is present, another verifying N/A fallback when absent. Also strengthened the existing byPhase test to assert total cost. All 560 tests pass.
